meaning: A mysterious letter opening this chapter
that (connects 'they were amazed' with 'a warner came')
so he said (after they were amazed)
one who constantly turns back (in repentance)
the harvested (crops that were cut down)
like that/similarly (referring to how Allah brings forth the dead on the Day of Resurrection, just as He brings dead land back to life)
but rather (correcting the previous statement about being tired with creation)
his self (the one doing the whispering)
he receives/is receiving (referring to the angel who records deeds)
the two who receive intensely/repeatedly (referring to the two angels)
the left side (direction from which an angel sits)
a watcher (referring to an angel who records deeds)
a watchful observer (referring to the recording angel)
from him/it (referring to what you were trying to avoid)
the one who (placed another god with Allah)
so throw him (command to two angels)
but/however (connects this contrast to previous statement)
for the ones who guard against (evil)
one who constantly returns to Allah
that (pointing to something far and specific)
they want/wish (what they want in this life)
and with us/and in our possession
or (connecting two options: having a heart OR listening attentively)
so be patient! (in response to what they say)
with/by the Quran (referring to the divine revelation)
